titleStmt.title: SII 20.86: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 86. (B.K. No. 38 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab lying in the Svāmiliṅga temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya Vikrama year 50, Vis11vāvasu, Pushya Śu. 6, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. The details given are irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1125, December 3, Thursday whereas the Saṁkramaṇa occurred on Friday, the 25th December.

The inscription records the gift of the village Seṁbevāḍa for the benefit of the temple of Svayaṁbhu Sōmēs11vara of Kaḍalevāḍa, by the king who was ruling from Jayantīpura and his subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Siṁgarasa of the Sīyāḷa family. The gift village is stated to have been situated in the kaṁpaṇa of Kummasi-30 included in the division of Tarddavāḍi-1000.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī Ōṁ namaśivāyaḥ svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire jayaṁntī
purada nelevīḍinoḷsukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire tatpādapadmō
pajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁñcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta vīraśrīkāṁnta tagaranagarā
dhīsvara subhaṭamahēsvara sīyāḷavaṁśōdbhava vibhavādharīkritapurūrava ḍaṁgārabhērī
nirghōṣaṇa samarayikabhīṣaṇa suvarṇnagaruḍadhvaja vimaḷakīrttidhvaja nā
yigana cakra paracakravakra nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanu mahāsāmaṁta
naralōka jagadaḷa mārkkōlabhairava dāyigabēṁṭekāṟa Udeganaṁkakāṟa śrīmanumahā maṁḍaḷēsva
ra siṁgarasaru . svasti śrīmacāḷukya vikramavariṣada 50 neya visvāvasu saṁvatsarada puṣya suddha
caṭṭi Ādivāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇada parvvadaṁdu śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva ruṁ manneya
siṁgarasaruṁ kaḍelevāḍada śrīsvayaṁbhu sōmēśvaradēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ tarddavāḍi sāsirada
kaṁpaṇa kuṁmmasimūvattaṟa baḷiya seṁ bevāḍada Ubhaya sāmyābhyaṁtara siddhiyiṁ dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ mmāḍi koṭṭaru sāmānyōyaṁ rnṛ pāṇāṁ kālē

nīyō bhavabhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhōgināṁ pārttiva bhūyō bhūyō yācatu rāma caṁdra . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vāṁ yō harētu vasuṁndharā saṣṭivvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
cittadoḷiṁtī dharmmama Ettānuṁ kiḍisaleṁdu bagedaṁdu naraṁ suttida kuṭuṁba sahitaṁ mattenna
de ravuravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷigu . tannittudakke peṟarittunnativaḍadirṛdudakke Intīdharmmamava
nāvanānōrvva mana vacana kāyakarṁmmadiṁda Upadravaṁ māḍidava vāraṇāsītīrada
lappa brāhmaṇaruvaṁ kavileyumanaḷida pātakakke salvaru . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 20.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
